ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cocoa powder, no added sugars, powder, instant

ingredients_text: Milk Chocolate (55%) (Sugar, Whole Milk Powder, Cocoa Mass*, Cocoa Butter*, Whey Powder (Milk), Emulsifier: Lecithins (Soya): Flavouring), Milk Truffle Filling (45%) (Sugar, Palm Fat, Palm Oil, Skimmed Milk Powder, Whey Powder (Milk), Lactose (Milk), Whole Milk Powder. Emulsifier: Lecithins (Soya)). Milk Solids 16 % Minimum. Cocoa Solids 28% Minimum.
